seoTitle: PrimaSTEM Product Sheet - Wholesale Educational Robot
seoDescription: Product sheet for distributors. Screen-free coding and math robot. CE + UKCA certified.
subtitle: Screen-free coding and mathematics · Ages 4–10 · Made from wood
intro: PrimaSTEM is a wooden programmable robot that teaches both coding and mathematics without a screen. Children place NFC command tokens on a tangible control board to build programs they can see and touch.
Two curriculum levels in one device: logic for ages 4–7 and real mathematics for ages 7–10. The robot draws geometric figures - stars, spirals, polygons - making math visible.
cert: CE + UKCA certified. Made in Cannes, France. Complete kit with online lesson plans in 10 languages.

kit.title: Ladybug Robot
items: USB-C charging, approximately 2 hours battery, depending on usage

specs.value: English, Français, Русский, Українська, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Português (Brasil), Nederlands, Norsk, Polski, Svenska, Türkçe, Dansk, Català, 日本語, עברית

commands.label: Movement & Program
commands.value: Forward, Backward, Left, Right, Random, Function, Pause

features.label: Drawing

features.label: Open platform
features.value: NFC tokens writable with free app

features.label: Compatible
features.value: Works with any grid map (10–25 cm step)

features.label: Voice feedback
features.value: Board speaks each command in 17 languages

margin.headline: You set your own retail price and margin
margin.note: Your market, your call. Wholesale terms discussed individually.
conditions: Marketing materials in your language. Technical support. Joint participation at trade shows. Territory exclusivity negotiable.
Early pilots and partners: Luxembourg (Ministry of Education pilot), Belgium (Code N Play), France (Terra Numerica). Distributor conversations underway across Europe.
All terms, pricing and exclusivity conditions are discussed individually. Contact us to start the conversation.
